response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) vastly exceeds the entry-level position, raising concerns about fit, retention, and salary expectations; his German language skill is minimal for a high on-site role in Berlin, and his focus on niche tech (DLang, custom infra) may not translate well to the platform's pragmatic, team-oriented needs.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven full-stack ownership from API to UI with real-world scaling examples
Active contributor to open-source and developer tooling, showing initiative and communication skills
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role; likely to leave quickly or demand senior compensation
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
Excessive focus on niche languages (DLang) and custom infrastructure may hinder team alignment
